name: Files Type
abstract: Defines properties: schema:additionalType, schema:description, schema:size, resultTarget, schema:relatedLink. Uses building blocks: dataDownload (schemaorgProperties), stringArray (adaProperties), image (adaProperties), imageMap (adaProperties), tabularData (adaProperties), collection (adaProperties), dataCube (adaProperties), document (adaProperties), supDocImage (adaProperties), otherFile (adaProperties).
